tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Add discover-reviews and review jobs to ci.yml', 'status': 'completed', 'act...[truncated 706 chars]...ast-ci)'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's the summary:
## Summary
**PR #8797**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8797
### Changes made:
1. **`.github/workflows/ci.yml`** — Added `discover-reviews` and `review` jobs (copied from `code-reviews.yml`) with `needs: [check-submission, fix-formatting]` so reviews run against properly formatted code. The `discover-reviews` job also gates on `needs.check-submission.outputs.skip == 'false'`. The `review` job references `needs: discover-reviews` for the matrix output.
2. **`.github/workflows/code-reviews.yml`** — Deleted. Its jobs now live in `ci.yml`.
3. **Minor prettier fixes** in two docs files (whitespace alignment in markdown tables).
### Key design decisions: - Reviews now wait for `fix-formatting` to complete before running, ensuring they always review properly formatted code - Job permissions are kept at job-level (not elevated at workflow-level) for least-privilege - The `discover-reviews` rename avoids ambiguity with any other `discover` jobs in ci.yml
